title: Execution snapshot producer runbook
goal: Define the producer-side operational path for Bureau and Grabowski raw exports feeding Leitstand snapshots, including freshness cadence, failure states, and non-authority boundaries.

acceptance.assertion: Runbook identifies which organ produces raw Bureau task state and Grabowski checkout inventory and where raw JSON is stored.
Runbook records expected refresh cadence and stale thresholds for Bureau and checkout snapshots.
Missing, stale, corrupt and fixture states are operationally explained without granting Leitstand repair or execution authority.

metadata.priority_reason: P3: needed before treating execution-axis snapshots as operationally current
